scripts.dev: concurrently -k -n api,ui -c blue,green "sh scripts/free-api-port.sh 8004 || true; .venv/bin/uvicorn backend.main:app --host 0.0.0.0 --port 8004 --reload --reload-dir backend --reload-dir utils --reload-dir parsers" "wait-on http-get://127.0.0.1:8004/api/health && npm run dev:public --prefix frontend"
